summary: First end-to-end test of Dapodik Ticketing System. Backend: 29/29 pytest tests passed (auth, kecamatan, sekolah, layanan, operator CRUD with dup-email/dup-sekolah, tickets create/list/get/status/comment/attachment-download, role gating, dashboard stats shape, Excel & PDF reports, operator-403 on /reports). Frontend: verified login (valid+invalid), role-gated sidebar, wrong-creds toast, koord master/reports access, operator-redirect from /master & /reports, ticket creation via Radix select with TCK-2026-NNNNNN number, status badge 'Diajukan', SLA badge 'Tepat Waktu', adding comment (timeline reflects it), koordinator changing status Diajukan->Diproses (timeline activity logged, operator notification badge increments), operator-only-sees-own-tickets, logout returns to /login.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer logs 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warning on first render of the SLA pie chart when there are zero open tickets; pie area appears empty (legend still shows). Consider rendering an empty-state or fixed minHeight on the chart container.

action_items: (Optional) Document the actual data-testids used on the create-ticket form (select-layanan, input-judul, input-deskripsi, select-prioritas, input-file, submit-ticket-button) — review_request listed older names like 'ticket-layanan-select'. Functionality works; this is a documentation alignment only.
(Optional) Add an empty-state placeholder to the SLA pie chart on /dashboard when on_time+almost+late == 0 to avoid the Recharts width/height warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 930+ line file; consider splitting into routers (auth, tickets, master, reports) for maintainability — file size exceeds the 700-line guideline.
Mongo `_id` is correctly mapped to `id` via doc_to_public — good.
Attachment endpoint enforces 5MB and PDF/JPG/PNG only — good. Consider also validating base64 padding (current size check is on raw base64 length).

CORS uses '*' from env with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject this combination. Currently works because frontend uses Bearer tokens, but cookies set on /api/auth/login will not be honored cross-origin. Set explicit origin list in production.
`require_role` correctly returns 403 for operators on koord-only endpoints (verified).
Operator-per-sekolah uniqueness is enforced on create but not on update; PUT /operators/{uid} could move a user to a sekolah that already has an operator.
seed_data_creation: Seed runs on startup; created 1 test ticket TCK-2026-000002 (Diproses) for SMPN 02 Bogor Utara during frontend E2E. Test data prefixed with TEST_ in backend tests is created+deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All review_request bullets pass. Real data-testids on create-ticket page: select-layanan (Radix combobox; must click and pick role=option), input-judul, input-deskripsi, select-prioritas, input-file, submit-ticket-button. Ticket detail testids include ticket-number, ticket-status, ticket-sla, ticket-title, ticket-description, ticket-timeline, change-status-button (koord only), status-select, confirm-status-change, comment-input, submit-comment-button, upload-attachment-input, attachments-list. Sidebar has nav-dashboard, nav-tickets, nav-reports (koord), nav-master (koord), nav-new-ticket (operator), notifications-bell, notifications-unread-badge, user-menu-trigger, menu-change-password. Login form: login-form, login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button.
